What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A woman wearing a pink long-sleeved top and black bottoms crouches on a brown carpeted floor. She uses both hands to unzip and adjust straps on a black rectangular bag with white trim. An orange wooden dresser with dark handles stands against the wall in the background. The woman folds a grey stroller on a patterned mat and lifts it away.
